_comment: Valid payload example for GeminiAnalysisOutput schema v1.0.0. This payload must pass validateGeminiOutput() without errors.

evidenceCitations.rationale: Sender domain registered 2 hours before the email was sent; SPF and DKIM both fail; display name spoofs CFO.
evidenceCitations.excerpt: From: "Sarah (CFO)" <cfo@evil-lookalike.com> | SPF: fail | DKIM: fail | Registered: 2026-05-26T10:58:00Z

evidenceCitations.rationale: Embedded link resolves to a known credential-harvesting page flagged by 38/90 AV engines.
Three employees followed the link within 4 minutes of delivery, indicating active credential harvesting may already be in progress.

reportSummary: A highly convincing spear-phishing email impersonating the CFO was delivered to 47 mailboxes. Three employees clicked the embedded credential-harvesting link. Immediate containment, password resets, and MFA verification are required. Severity rated CRITICAL due to active exploitation evidence.
